Table	Create Table
advances	CREATE TABLE `advances` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `companyId` int NOT NULL,
  `employeeId` int NOT NULL,
  `mesReferencia` varchar(7) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `valorAdiantamento` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `valorLiquido` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `descontoIR` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `bancoDestino` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `diasFaltas` int DEFAULT '0',
  `aprovado` enum('Pendente','Aprovado','Reprovado') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Pendente',
  `motivoReprovacao` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `dataPagamento` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `observacoes` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=30001
